17 March 2026

APPROVALS ( RFO 6.104-2(a) Table 6-1 & R-DFARS 206.104-72 Table 206.1)
Department of the Air Force: Justification for Other Than Full and Open Competition
March 2026 Page 2 of 3March 2026 Page 2 of 3
I. Agency and Contracting Activity (RFO 6.104-1(a)(1)):
Agency: AFGSC
Contracting Activity: 509th Contracting Squadron, 660 Tenth Street Suite 222, Whiteman AFB MO 65305

II. Nature and/or description of the action being approved (RFO 6.104-1(a)(2)):
The action to be processed is justification for the use of other than full and open competition due to the availability of only
one responsible source. In this particular acquisition, HSQ Tech, Inc. is the sole manufacture and proprietor of their software
and systems. This software and system monitors and controls the Waste Water Treatment Plant, Water Plant, Electrical
Generators, Transfer Switches, Electrical Systems, and Fire Suppression System to ensure that all of the services are running
within the correct parameters. In order to solicit this requirement under Full and Open Competition, the entire infrastructure
in which this system utilizes would need to be reconstructed including the upgrade of 69 remote
field RTU/PLC panels as well as all existing monitors, laptops, network switches, routers, radio, Oracle Dell Server, UPS's, and
modems. Doing so would cost up to an estimated $7M. III. Description of supplies/services required to meet agency needs (RFO 6.104-1(a)(3)):
This requirement is to provide service and maintenance for the Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) System
which is currently installed at Whiteman AFB in accordance with the Statement of Work. The SCADA system monitors and
controls the Waste Water Treatment Plant, Water Plant, Electrical Generators, Transfer Switches, Electrical Systems, and Fire
Suppression System. This is a service for a base year and four (4) option years. IV. Statutory Authority Permitting Other Than Full and Open Competition (RFO 6.104-1(a)(4)):
10 U.S.C. 3204(a)(1), Only one responsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements. V. Rationale for Use of Authority (RFO 6.104-1(a)(5)):
This system must be serviced by HSQ Tech, Inc. due to its proprietary nature. HSQ Tech, Inc. is the only company trained to
service and install their proprietary software and associated hardware. All of the software and a majority of the internal
hardware for the current SCADA system is created by HSQ Tech, Inc. and can only be maintained by this contractor. HSQ
Tech, Inc. has been selected for this service for several reasons: Whiteman AFB has a full complement of HSQ Tech, Inc.
systems and HSQ Tech, Inc. has proprietary rights to all software and associated hardware. Purchasing services through HSQ
Tech, Inc. will guarantee system performance, reliability, and security. Purchasing this service under Full and Open
Competition would cause significant hardship to the Government and the internal systems that utilize the current SCADA
system. VI. Integrated Market Analysis and Efforts to Solicit Competition (RFO 6.104-1(a)(6), (8), and (10)):
Our agency contacted HSQ Tech, Inc. to verify if any other entities are certified to work on the company's software. Gus
Jimenez, Vice President and Chief Operations Officer for HSQ Tech, Inc., responded to our agency on 19 February 2026 by
stating, "No there is not." See "Email-Proprietary System."
